rules: No generic sans like Inter for headings. Use Clash Display or similar geometric display for a sharp, modern, editorial feel.
Headings must use tracking-tight to create tension.
Keep text contrast high: use zinc-50 for primary text, zinc-400 for secondary text.
Overlines or labels must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em], text-zinc-400.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use Neumorphism + Glassmorphism hybrid. Sharp 1px borders (border-zinc-800) with subtle ambient shadows. Never use pure transparent background for navigation or overlays. Always use backdrop-blur-xl + bg-zinc-950/80.
visual_enhancers.shapes: Subtle roundness. max rounded-xl for large cards, rounded-lg for buttons. Avoid fully pill-shaped except for status badges.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise/grain texture overlaid on the background for a tactile, physical barbershop feel.

navigation.mobile: Bottom navigation bar fixed to bottom, rounded-t-2xl, border-t border-zinc-800, backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/80. Active icon in amber-500.
navigation.desktop: Collapsible left sidebar for admin dashboard. 1px border-r border-zinc-800.

cards.style: Flat solid surfaces (bg-zinc-900) with a hard 1px border (border-zinc-800) and no soft drop shadow. Hover state: -translate-y-1, border-zinc-700 transition-all.
cards.padding: p-6 for standard, p-8 for hero cards.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-zinc-950 font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:bg-amber-400 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-50 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-zinc-50 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 outline-none transition-all

grids_layouts.dashboard: Bento grid style. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Important KPIs span 3 columns, charts span 8 columns, side info spans 4 columns.
grids_layouts.mobile_scheduling: Vertical flow. Generous spacing (gap-6). Time slots in a horizontally scrollable container or a dense flex-wrap grid.
grids_layouts.spacing_scale: Use generous padding. Section padding: py-12 to py-24.

motion.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform duration-300 ease-out.
motion.interactions: Hover states on all cards and buttons. Active states scale-95 for buttons.
motion.page_transitions: Framer motion fade and slide-up (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against zinc-950/900 is at least WCAG AA. Amber-500 against zinc-950 is high contrast. Buttons with dark text (zinc-950) on amber background.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='booking-submit-button').

hero_barbershop.description: Modern barbershop interior for landing page hero or location thumbnail. Use with bg-black/50 overlay.

tools_accent.description: Stainless steel scissors and comb. Good for service category thumbnails or abstract background elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.icons_strategy: Use lucide-react for sharp, clean iconography suitable for tools.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_structure: Build reusable UI components in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/ using Tailwind.
instructions_to_main_agent.js_usage: CRITICAL: You are working in a JavaScript environment, NOT TypeScript. Use .jsx/.js extensions and remove all TS interfaces/types.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use optical alignment, tension, and asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and 1px sharp borders.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/80) on sticky headers and bottom navs.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. No .App { text-align: center; }.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, scale down on click.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Use py-12, gap-8.
Never use generic AI assistant Emoji characters like bots or brains for icons. Use proper SVG libraries.
Always use the provided actual image URLs. NEVER use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
For the SaaS Dashboard: follow 'The Performance Pro' / 'High-Contrast' dark theme aesthetic.
Ensure the booking flow is heavily mobile-first: large tappable areas, sticky bottom CTA 'Confirm Booking', horizontal scrolling date pickers.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or modals. Always use solid zinc-900 or glassmorphism with high opacity.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
